c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating potential reach.
Listing fees, commission fees, or transaction fees charged by the app.
The primary types of items the app is best suited for selling (e.g., clothing, electronics, handmade items).
The shipping methods available for sellers (e.g., prepaid labels, seller-arranged shipping, local pickup).
Whether the app primarily focuses on local sales or provides options for nationwide/global shipping.
Ease of use and navigation within the app.
Measures taken to ensure secure transactions and user verification (e.g., user ratings, verified profiles, safe meeting spots).
